series_description: Original application forms that resulted in the issuance of a license or certificate pursuant to R.C. Chapter 4715.
retention_statement: Paper: PAPER: Retain for five (5) years. After five years, scan onto CD-ROM

series_title: Renewal applications: completed and returned by Li
series_description: Renewal application forms submitted by persons seeking renewal of a license or certicate issued under R.C. Chapter 47.15
Complaints filed with the Board pursuant to R.C. Chapter 4715 that fail to state an alleged violation of the Dental Practice Act.
retention_statement: Paper: Six months; destroy ; Electronic: Six months; destroy

series_description: Documents that serve to convey information of temporary importance, including but not limited to: phone messages, phone logs, post-it notes, calendars, facsimile coversheets, notes to convey information and for follow-up, drafts of documents upon which no official agency action is taken, routine correspondence, routine e-mail and routine voice mail.
retention_statement: Electronic: ALL: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Paper: ALL: Retain until no longer of adminsitrative value

series_description: Daily recording of investigator call-ins with proposed task schedule for day.
Information pertaining to audit of continuing education, which may include; correspondence, certified mail receipts, licensee''s log of continuing education, supporting documentation, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: If case file is created for non-compliance ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years following the end of the biennium in which the licensee is in compliance with audit requirements.

series_title: Continuing Education Logs for Licensure Renewal
series_description: Submitted log of continuing education from dental/dental hygiene licensees, listing hours of continuing education hours earned, date completed, name of sponsor/provider, title of course, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years following the end of the biennium in which the licensee is in compliance with all continuing educaiton requirements.

series_description: Request for waivers or extensions of continuing education requirments, including but not limited to, written requests, correspondence, medical records of licensee, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years following the end of the renewal period to which the waiver/extension request applied.

series_title: Continuing Education Sponsor Applications and Renewal Applications
series_description: Files contain continuing education sponsor applications and renewal applications which include, but are not limited to; applications, program/course information, presenter information, correspondence, and evaluation materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 2 years following the end of the biennium of last Board-approval status. ; Electronic: Computer data file: Retain for 2 years following the end of the biennium of last Board-approval status.

series_description: Results of criminal records checks conducted by Ohio BCI&I and the FBI for dental/dental hygiene license and dental/dental hygiene limited teaching license applicants.
retention_statement: Paper: For "No Records" identified criminal background checks, document in the licensure file that the information was received and

series_description: Official minutes, orders, and decisions of the Board, including any appendices, attachments, or referenced materials.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until 2 years after minutes have been transcribed, reviewed for accuracey and completeness, approved and signed by Acting Board Officers. Scan to CD-ROM ; Electronic: CD-ROM: Retain permanently.

series_description: Powerpoint presentations, videotapes, handouts, and other materials generated by the Board for presentations by Board members or Board staff on Board operations and/or procedures.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until the information is no longer currrent, and until no longer of administrative value. ; Electronic: Retain until the information is not longer current, and until no longer of administrative value.

series_title: Complaint Investigation Files - Closed without formal disciplinary action
series_description: Complaint investigation files closed by Board after investigation wherein no formal disciplinary action was taken or referral to QUIP was made, containing confidential information including but not limited to: complaints filed with the Board pursuant to R.C. Chapter 4715 and documents relating to the processing and investigation of complaints such as complaint, reports of investigation, correspondence and memoranda, subpoenas, evidence, warning letters and related documents, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for seven (7) years after the completed case is closed by the Board ; Paper: Retain until scanned or saved into Board enforcement database

series_title: Audio and Working Notes from Board Meetings
series_description: Audio recordings and working notes for purposes of transcribing minutes of Board meetings.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain working notes until minutes have been transcribed. ; Electronic: Retain audio until minutes have been transcribed.

series_description: Open complaint investigation files including reports, correspondence, records (dental and other) gathered by Enforcement Officers/Investigators
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until scanned or saved into Board enforcement database ; Electronic: Retain electronic record for seven (7) years after the final action of the Board
